text:
☀ Boost Boss Standup — 2026-06-30 (study beachhead)

1) Run: densified the study beachhead → 6 new qualified publishers (0 overlap) → 2 outreach drafts (gated, nothing sent). Finding: 2,800+ AI-education startups, $4.2B funded — a dense, dual-sided niche with high self-liquidation potential.
2) Needs you: approve the 2 drafts when ready; bless HomeworkO / YouLearn / StudyFetch / itutor as the first install targets.
3) Approvals: 2 drafts waiting in #approvals.
4) Watch: sends gated on domain warm-up. YouLearn is dual-sided (also a SuperBoost lead).
5) Focus: lock the first ~5 study publishers to install and start the calibration-onboarding loop.
